ucs.title: [LLM] TA577 NTLM hash theft via zipped .url + outbound SMB to attacker server (Feb-Mar 2024 campaign)
ucs.description: Hunts TA577's distinctive thread-hijacked phishing wave that delivered ZIP attachments containing Windows .url shortcuts with a file:// SMB referrer, coercing the host to NTLM-authenticate to an attacker-controlled server. Catches the chain: archive extraction drops a .url file, then the user's host opens an outbound SMB (TCP/445) session to a public IP within seconds.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.action=created Filesystem.file_name="*.url" Filesystem.process_name IN ("explorer.exe","7zg.exe","7zfm.exe","winrar.exe","Rar.exe","outlook.exe") by _time, Filesystem.dest, Filesystem.user, Filesystem.file_path, Filesystem.file_name, Filesystem.process_name | rename Filesystem.* AS * | eval drop_time=_time, dropper=process_name | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_port=445 All_Traffic.dest_category!="internal" by _time, All_Traffic.src, All_Traffic.dest_ip, All_Traffic.dest_port, All_Traffic.process_name | rename All_Traffic.src AS dest, All_Traffic.dest_ip AS smb_dest_ip, All_Traffic.dest_port AS smb_dest_port, All_Traffic.process_name AS smb_process | eval conn_time=_time ] | where conn_time>=drop_time AND conn_time<=drop_time+180 | table drop_time, conn_time, dest, user, file_path, file_name, dropper, smb_dest_ip, smb_dest_port, smb_process
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowSec = 180;
let UrlDrops = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FileName endswith ".url"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("explorer.exe","7zg.exe","7zfm.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe","outlook.exe")
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              AccountName = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              UrlFilePath = FolderPath, UrlFileName = FileName,
              Dropper = InitiatingProcessFileName;
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where RemotePort == 445
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"                       // outbound SMB to internet = anomalous
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("svchost.exe") // domain-trust noise
| join kind=inner UrlDrops on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (DropTime .. DropTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| project DropTime, ConnTime = Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          UrlFilePath, UrlFileName, Dropper,
          RemoteIP, RemotePort,
          SmbInitiator = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          SmbInitiatorCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| order by ConnTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowSec = 180;
let UrlDrops = ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventType == "FileCreated"
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".url"
    | where ActingProcessName has_any ("explorer.exe","7zg.exe","7zfm.exe","winrar.exe","rar.exe","outlook.exe")
    | project DropTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
              ActorUsername, TargetFilePath, TargetFileName,
              Dropper = ActingProcessName;
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where DstPortNumber == 445
| where not(ipv4_is_private(DstIpAddr))
| where not(DstIpAddr startswith "127.") and not(DstIpAddr startswith "169.254.")
| join kind=inner UrlDrops on DvcHostname
| where TimeGenerated between (DropTime .. DropTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| project DropTime, ConnTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          TargetFilePath, TargetFileName, Dropper,
          DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber,
          SmbInitiator = ActingProcessName
| order by ConnTime desc
ucs.rationale: This is a TA577 fingerprint, not a generic technique. Proofpoint observed TA577 (the same IAB CrowdStrike clusters with QakBot/Pikabot/Latrodectus distribution) running this exact campaign on 26-27 Feb 2024 and 4 Mar 2024 — thread-hijacked replies carrying ZIPs of .url files whose URL= line pointed at SMB shares on attacker servers. The combination of (a) .url file written by an archive utility or

ucs.title: [LLM] TA577 Pikabot/Latrodectus delivery chain: JS host -> curl.exe -> msiexec/rundll32 with remote URL
ucs.description: Hunts the script-engine-driven loader chain TA577 has used since mid-2023 to push Pikabot and (from late-2023) Latrodectus: a .js dropper extracted from a ZIP/IMG is launched by wscript/cscript, which spawns curl.exe (or PowerShell) to fetch a remote MSI/DLL, then hands off to msiexec.exe or rundll32.exe to detonate.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe") Processes.process_name="curl.exe" (Processes.process="*http://*" OR Processes.process="*https://*") by _time, Processes.dest, Processes.user, Processes.parent_process_name, Processes.parent_process, Processes.process, Processes.process_id | rename Processes.* AS * | eval curl_time=_time, curl_cmd=process | join type=inner dest user [ | tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("msiexec.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe") (Processes.process="*http://*" OR Processes.process="*https://*" OR Processes.process="*.msi*" OR Processes.process="*.dll,*") by _time, Processes.dest, Processes.user, Processes.process, Processes.process_name, Processes.parent_process_name | rename Processes.process AS child_cmd, Processes.process_name AS child_proc, Processes.parent_process_name AS child_parent | eval child_time=_time ] | where child_time>=curl_time AND child_time<=curl_time+120 | table curl_time, child_time, dest, user, parent_process_name, curl_cmd, child_proc, child_parent, child_cmd
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowSec = 120;
// 1. Script host (wscript/cscript/mshta) spawning curl.exe to a URL
let CurlFromScript = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe")
    | where FileName =~ "curl.exe"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("http://","https://")
    | where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (".js",".jse",".wsf",".vbs",".hta")
       or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Local\Temp\",@"\Users\Public\",@"\AppData\Roaming\")
    | project CurlTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ScriptHost = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ScriptCmd  = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              CurlCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
              CurlPid    = ProcessId;
// 2. msiexec/rundll32/regsvr32 child on same host within 2 minutes carrying a URL or remote DLL/MSI
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where FileName in~ ("msiexec.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("http://","https://",".msi",".dll")
| join kind=inner CurlFromScript on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (CurlTime .. CurlTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| project CurlTime, ChildTime = Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ScriptHost, ScriptCmd, CurlCmd,
          ChildProcess = FileName, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine
| order by ChildTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowSec = 120;
let CurlFromScript = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where ParentProcessName has_any ("\\wscript.exe","\\cscript.exe","\\mshta.exe")
    | where NewProcessName endswith "\\curl.exe"
    | where CommandLine has_any ("http://","https://")
    | project CurlTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              ScriptHost = ParentProcessName,
              CurlCmd    = CommandLine;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where NewProcessName has_any ("\\msiexec.exe","\\rundll32.exe","\\regsvr32.exe")
| where CommandLine has_any ("http://","https://",".msi",".dll")
| join kind=inner CurlFromScript on Computer, Account
| where TimeGenerated between (CurlTime .. CurlTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| project CurlTime, ChildTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          ScriptHost, CurlCmd,
          ChildProcess = NewProcessName, ChildCmd = CommandLine
| order by ChildTime desc
ucs.rationale: Script-engine -> curl.exe -> msiexec/rundll32 from a remote URL is the canonical TA577 loader flow documented by Proofpoint, Microsoft (Storm-0464), and Palo Alto Unit42 across QakBot (pre-takedown), Pikabot (Mar 2023+), and Latrodectus (Oct 2023+). Each link of the chain is suspicious in isolation but firmly characteristic of TA577 in combination: (a) wscript/cscript launching a child at all is r
